message:
Fix settings save failure after kc-agent restart + increase error capture limits (#11167)

agentFetch now clears the stale cached token and retries with a fresh one
on 401, fixing the "Save failed" state that persists until manual page
reload after kc-agent restarts with a new token.

Also increases browser error ring buffer from 30 to 50 entries and the
GitHub issue display cap from 20 to 50 so all captured errors are shown
without truncation.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -552,7 +552,7 @@ func (h *FeedbackHandler) createGitHubIssueInRepo(ctx context.Context, request *
 	consoleErrorBlock := ""
 	if len(consoleErrors) > 0 {
 		var errLines strings.Builder
-		const maxConsoleErrors = 20
+		const maxConsoleErrors = 50
 		shown := len(consoleErrors)
 		if shown > maxConsoleErrors {
 			shown = maxConsoleErrors
